about_quotes.speaker: Jake Hanna
about_quotes.evidence: on sax we had Roger Pemberton... Mort Lindsay was the band leader
about_quotes.doc_title: Jake Hanna interviewed by Monk Rowe, Aspen, Colorado, October 11, 1997

about_quotes.speaker: Jamey Aebersold
about_quotes.evidence: I was showing my friend one day. And Roger Pemberton... Roger Pemberton was giving us a two person arranging lesson.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jamey Aebersold interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, September 26, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Lew Tabackin
about_quotes.evidence: Roger Pemberton, he was playing baritone in that band. And he gave me a really great compliment
about_quotes.doc_title: Lew Tabackin interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 17, 1999
